task_completion.description: Verify successful login to FreeMED using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED main dashboard, navigation menu, or calendar view indicating that the user is successfully logged in (often showing 'admin' or a logout button).

task_completion.description: Locate Marcus Vance's 09:00 AM appointment in the scheduler or patient records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED calendar/scheduler view or patient module displaying the name 'Marcus Vance' associated with an appointment time of 09:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Open the appointment details or edit screen for Marcus Vance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open dialog box, edit form, or context menu specifically for modifying Marcus Vance's 09:00 AM appointment.
Look for a status dropdown menu, radio button, or text field within the appointment edit screen where 'No-Show', 'No Show', or 'Missed' is actively selected or entered.

task_completion.description: Confirm the appointment status update has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the updated scheduler view, patient record, or a success message showing that Marcus Vance's 09:00 AM appointment is now officially marked with a 'No-Show' (or equivalent) status.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard web browser interface navigating the FreeMED system. There should be no terminal windows running SQL queries, curl commands, or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the genuine FreeMED web application interface, not a text editor, notes app, or terminal echoing the task description.

integrity.description: Verify the UI wasn't artificially modified using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools (like Inspect Element or DOM editors) open that could be used to fake the 'No-Show' status text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Marcus Vance. Appointment Time: 09:00 AM. Target Status: 'No Show' (acceptable variations include 'No-Show' or 'Missed'). The VLM should verify that the appointment for this specific patient and time was updated to the target status within the FreeMED web interface.
